## Runtime feature ownership

### Why this must be decided now

The editor and runtime both need the same feature snapshot.

### Structure tree

```text
FeatureCoordinator
`- IFeatureSource
```

### Illustrative code

```csharp
public interface IFeatureSource { }
```

### Recommended: A - coordinator owns lifecycle

Keep construction and cleanup in FeatureCoordinator.

### Your decision

Use A?
